title: Even More Growth in Steel Production Outside of China
section_path: Even More Growth in Steel Production Outside of China
section_path_text: Even More Growth in Steel Production Outside of China
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Global steel production totaled approximately 150 million tons in October. This is up month-on-month by 700,000 tons (1%) and is 2.7 million tons (2%) more than was reported last year for October 2022's production. Production outside of China totaled 70.9 million tons.
